---
title: "Interactive Lloyd Demo"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

<iframe
  src="lloyd_demo_app.html"
  title="Interactive geometry-driven hyperuniformity Lloyd demo"
  style="width: 100%; height: 1400px; border: 0; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden;"
  loading="lazy">
</iframe>
